name: Firoz Miya
subtitle: Network Engineer & Systems Administrator — 8+ years
headline: I keep enterprise servers, networks and Linux boxes running — and I'm now Red Hat Certified to back it up.
summary: Network Engineer and Systems Administrator with 8+ years of hands-on experience across enterprise network design, Windows Server infrastructure, virtualization and IT operations. Recently earned the RHCSA (EX200) certification, built on hands-on practice with SELinux, LVM, systemd, firewalld and shell automation across Red Hat Enterprise Linux. Looking for a Linux/RHEL administration role where that networking and systems background is an asset, not a footnote.
